text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's early February, and the weather's still
ruthlessly cold.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! Hey, Trainer! I got a question for you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Are you more of a "sweet" person or a "bitter"
person?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Come on, just answer the question! I got a lot of
'em to get through!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mayano says adults usually prefer bitter, but what
about you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I see... Okay, next question.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Are you a heart shape kinda person? Or is any
shape okay with you?
choice_data_list: Is this about Valentine's Day chocolate?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! How'd you figure it out?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aw, I really wanted to surprise you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must've put a lot of thought into this. Now I
feel bad...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Welp, looks like the cat's outta the bag.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm gonna give you Valentine's chocolates.
But keep answering my questions anyway, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I tell her my favorite type of chocolate, the
toppings I like, and so on...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, I've got your tastes all figured out! Just you wait, I'm gonna make the perfect treat for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon enough, the big day arrives.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...As in, the clock literally just struck midnight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Dayyy!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. See, I was kinda sad my big surprise got
spoiled.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But this way, I still got you! Ah, that was fun!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I gotta get back to my dorm now. See you
tomorrow―I mean today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Tokai Teio's love of surprises, I have a
feeling I'll look back fondly on this year's
Valentine's Day for a long time to come.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, last question!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I asked all that 'cause I was gonna make you some
chocolate, but would you prefer the store-bought
stuff?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Okay, good to know! You can go ahead
and get excited now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Valentine's Day arrives...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Dayyy!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Go on! Eat one already! I made them just the way
you like 'em!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I try a cute little heart-shaped chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The flavor spreads throughout my mouth. It's slightly bitter, with hints of... wasabi?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh! Did you get the wasabi one already?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! These are Russian roulette chocolates!
Gotcha good, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I did wanna surprise you originally,
remember? The rest are normal though, so you
can relax. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shock of Tokai Teio's homemade wasabi
chocolate will leave a lasting impression on my
heart.
